summary: Iteration 34 - Security Hardening & Code Quality Regression Tests PASSED. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Dashboard loads with 14/14 engines, Fresh Meal Systems panel opens with all 11 tabs, Ops Center is default tab with live data. CORS blocks evil.com at localhost:8001, allows preview domain and localhost:3000. Security headers present. Rate limiting active. Regex escape prevents injection. No MongoDB _id leaks.
critical_code_review_comments: CORS lockdown correctly implemented with env-based origins (CORS_ORIGINS in .env)
Rate limiting tiered correctly: POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH at 60/min, GET at 200/min
escape_regex utility in security.py properly escapes regex special chars
MongoDB connection pooling configured for mega-resort scale (maxPoolSize=100, minPoolSize=10)
FMS indexes added for fms_products, fms_production_runs, fms_assembly_lanes, fms_subscriptions, fms_routes, fms_safety_records
Security headers present: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-Request-ID, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy
All 10 engines active in health endpoint
seed_data_creation: Used existing TEST_FMS_* prefixed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 verified security hardening changes: CORS lockdown (env-based origins), regex injection prevention (re.escape), MongoDB _id leak fixes, connection pooling (maxPoolSize=100), FMS indexes, tiered rate limiting (write 60/min, read 200/min), security headers. All 23 backend tests pass. Frontend loads correctly with Dashboard showing 14/14 engines and Fresh Meal Systems panel with all 11 tabs (Ops Center default). No regressions from security changes.
